title: antirrhinum thuillieri
intro: Antirrhinum thuillieri, commonly known as the Alpenrose or Yellow Snapdragon, is a perennial plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, Antirrhinum thuillieri is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
